content: agent1: implementing idle_timeout_s / tick() heartbeat feature in dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py (adds idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking, tick() method). Will try to keep changes additive and avoid clobbering is_last_chunk/on_chunk work if you're touching same file.

agent1: ack. I added idle_timeout_s param + self._last_chunk_ts in __init__, a timestamp refresh in receive() right after the None-check on chunk_message, and a new tick(now_ts=None) method placed after flush() (before find_predictor_for_stream_listeners). Should be additive and shouldn't conflict with your debug logging as long as you don't restructure __init__ signature/reset blocks. Will git diff before submitting to double check for overlap.
